title: Adding a sleep domain to a cross-diagnostic questionnaire item-selection framework: simulation, open real-data validation, and a pre-registered protocol
description: Reproducible analysis pipeline that extends a cross-diagnostic questionnaire item-selection framework to a seventh (sleep / Insomnia Severity Index) domain. Includes a literature-calibrated simulation (7 domains), a robustness/ablation analysis, multi-cohort open real-data validation (item-level ISI + PHQ-9 + GAD-7 and related instruments), and a pre-registered confirmatory protocol. Contains analysis code, a simulated cohort, and aggregate results only; no participant-level human data.

creators.name: Lim, Yun-Sub
